text.title: Product Discovery Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding Product Discovery. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Discovery is time-boxed at 1-4 weeks; if longer is needed, split into staged discoveries.
rule.rationale: Discovery is time-boxed at 1-4 weeks; if longer is needed, split into staged discoveries.

rule.statement: Address all four risks (value, usability, feasibility, viability) explicitly; missing one is a gap.
rule.rationale: Address all four risks (value, usability, feasibility, viability) explicitly; missing one is a gap.

rule.statement: Each risk is tested with a pre-registered method (interview / prototype / spike / financial model).
rule.rationale: Each risk is tested with a pre-registered method (interview / prototype / spike / financial model).

rule.statement: Output verdict is one of go / hold / no-op with a one-sentence rationale citing evidence.
rule.rationale: Output verdict is one of go / hold / no-op with a one-sentence rationale citing evidence.

rule.statement: Every claim links to an artefact (transcript timestamp, prototype URL, spike notes, financial sheet).
rule.rationale: Every claim links to an artefact (transcript timestamp, prototype URL, spike notes, financial sheet).

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-product-discovery.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
